revision.text: {{User-multi/template | User = {{{1|{{{User|{{{user|}}}}}}}}} | demo = {{{demo|}}} | noping = {{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}|no|yes}} |t |c |{{#if:{{#titleparts:{{{1|}}}|1|2}}||c64}} |dc |{{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}||nuke}} |{{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}||l}} |efl |{{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}|whois}} | {{#ifeq:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpV4Range|{{{1|}}}}}|1|rdns}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpV4|{{{1|}}}}}|1|rdns}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}|rbl}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}|http}} |bu | bl }}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Talk||__NOINDEX__}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{User-multi/template | User = {{{1|{{{User|{{{user|}}}}}}}}} | demo = {{{demo|}}} | noping = {{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}|no|yes}} |t |c |{{#if:{{#titleparts:{{{1|}}}|1|2}}||c64}} |dc |{{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}||nuke}} |{{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}||l}} |efl |{{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}|whois}} | {{#ifeq:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpV4Range|{{{1|}}}}}|1|rdns}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpV4|{{{1|}}}}}|1|rdns}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}|rbl}} | {{#if:{{#invoke:IPAddress|isIpOrRange|{{{1|}}}}}|http}} |bu | bl }}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Talk||__NOINDEX__}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
